description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by dense, leafy green trees that form a partial ring around the structure, providing privacy and shade. The house itself features a compact, rectangular footprint with a visible driveway leading up to the entrance. The roof appears to be low-pitched and likely constructed from shingles, typical of suburban bungalows. The front yard is landscaped, and the driveway extends from the street to the house, suggesting a garage or carport is present. Windows are visible on the front facade, arranged in a simple, functional pattern. The overall setting evokes a quiet, suburban neighborhood with a focus on greenery and outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow nestled within a dense ring of leafy trees, featuring a driveway and a simple, functional window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway leading to the entrance, with the house partially obscured by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the house more clearly within the tree ring, with the driveway extending from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly covered by trees, with only a small portion of the house and driveway visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway extending to the right, and the house largely hidden by foliage.
